mapper.sql: er.id, er.exam_id, er.paper_id, er.candidate_id, er.start_time, er.submit_time, er.total_score, er.objective_score, er.subjective_score, er.status, er.create_time, er.update_time, COALESCE(er.exam_name, e.name) as exam_name, COALESCE(er.paper_name, p.name) as paper_name, COALESCE(er.candidate_name, c.name) as candidate_name
mapper.select: select from exam_record er left join exam e on er.exam_id = e.id left join paper p on er.paper_id = p.id left join candidate c on er.candidate_id = c.id where er.id = #{id}
select from exam_record er left join exam e on er.exam_id = e.id left join paper p on er.paper_id = p.id left join candidate c on er.candidate_id = c.id order by er.create_time desc

select from exam_record er left join exam e on er.exam_id = e.id left join paper p on er.paper_id = p.id left join candidate c on er.candidate_id = c.id where er.exam_id = #{examId} and er.candidate_id = #{candidateId}
mapper.insert: insert into exam_record(exam_id, exam_name, paper_id, paper_name, candidate_id, candidate_name, start_time, submit_time, total_score, objective_score, subjective_score, status) values(#{examId}, #{examName}, #{paperId}, #{paperName}, #{candidateId}, #{candidateName}, #{startTime}, #{submitTime}, #{totalScore}, #{objectiveScore}, #{subjectiveScore}, #{status})
mapper.delete:
delete from exam_record where id in
#{id}
